rag_rules: Place input assumptions in component type annexes when bounds are concrete or visible
Use assign only for implementation-level bindings with existing outputs or auxiliary variables
Avoid placing guarantees in implementation scope
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
generic_rules: Use named constants or visible relations for concrete bounds in assumptions
Align helper declaration types with expression types to avoid type mismatches
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
Use eq for Boolean expressions and avoid range comparisons over non-numeric data
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use value_in_range : bool = value_in >= lower_limit and value_in <= upper_limit; for range checks
eq chosen = select_first ? input_a : input_b; for conditional selection
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantees in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
